ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* Chromosome where the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand of the gene (positive or negative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_terms" (
  "term_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each term */,
  "term_name" TEXT /* Name of the term */,
  "term_description" TEXT /* Description of the term */,
  "term_type" TEXT /* Type of the term (e.g., biological process, molecular function) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of the function (e.g., catalytic activity, binding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_term_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., is_a, part_of) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_term_relationships_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES gene_terms ("term_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_term_relationships_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_function_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of the relationship (e.g., enables, involved_in) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_function_relationships_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES gene_functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_function_relationships_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data (e.g., microarray, RNA-seq) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "microarray_experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform used for the experiment (e.g., Affymetrix, Illumina) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rna_seq_experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "library_type" TEXT /* Type of the library (e.g., single-end, paired-end) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_data_microarray" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the microarray experiment */,
  "probe_id" TEXT /* ID of the probe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_microarray_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES microarray_experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_microarray_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_data_rna_seq" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "expression_level" REAL /* Expression level of the gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the RNA-seq experiment */,
  "read_count" INTEGER /* Number of reads for the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_rna_seq_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES rna_seq_experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_data_rna_seq_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES gene_expression_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_ontology" (
  "ontology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ontology entry */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "term_id" INTEGER /* ID of the term */,
  "ontology_name" TEXT /* Name of the ontology (e.g., GO, KEGG) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ontology_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_ontology_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_ontology_term_id FOREIGN KEY ("term_id") REFERENCES gene_terms ("term_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "functional_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., enrichment analysis, regression analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functional_analysis_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES gene_functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functional_analysis_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the pathway */,
  "pathway_description" TEXT /* Description of the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pathway_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_relationships_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_relationships_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)
